title: phagnalon saxatile
intro: Phagnalon saxatile, also known as rock phagnalon or Greek rock cineraria, is a flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is a shrubby perennial herb that grows up to 30 cm in height and produces yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phagnalon saxatile include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures.
